heading: Entitlement to independent living services and assistance
label: 3109 Entitlement to independent living services and assistance
text: In any case in which the Secretary has determined under that the achievement of a vocational goal by a veteran currently is not reasonably feasible, such veteran shall be entitled, in accordance with the provisions of , to a program of independent living services and assistance designed to enable such veteran to achieve maximum independence in daily living.section 3106(e) of this titlesection 3120 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 3109 was renumbered .section 5309 of this title

Amendments1996— substituted “3106(e)” for “3106(d)”.Pub. L. 104–2751991— renumbered as this section and substituted “3106(d)” for “1506(d)” and “3120” for “1520”.Pub. L. 102–83section 1509 of this title1989— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 101–2371986— inserted “currently” after first reference to “veteran”.Pub. L. 99–576
